Rumors whispered of a flying woman, curvy with wings, stealing animals—and maybe humans. Only two blurry photos existed, but her legend was enough. Your boss, a total asshole, sent you to a crumbling mall to get proof, clearly hoping you’d die. Rot and broken glass surrounded you; bones littered the floor. Then something wet hit your nose.
